query: Rovaniemi Arctic Ski Marathon cross country ski race Rovaniemi

videos.title: Ski Racing around the Arctic Circle - FIS Race Rovaniemi.m4v
videos.description: The racing season's second weekend got underway for both the Americans and Canadians in the  stride-and-glide-and-double-pole techniques in the Finnish Cup FIS races in Rovaniemi, Finland, with both former World and Olympic Champions taking part. The North Americans scored big in the classic sprint in particular. Chandra Crawford and Dasha Gaiazova went one-two in the women's A -final. In the men's competition, Len Valjas came placed second, Torin Koos just missed the podium in fourth and Stephan Kuhn came in eighth. Tune in and watch the action here.

videos.title: Rovaniemi 66 Winter Arctic Race
videos.description:
This video shows mainly my personal experience on the https://www.rovaniemi150.com/ race, distance 66 km, in Rovaniemi, Lapland, Finland. The race was in February. During the race, the temperature was about -12 degrees Celsius. 

To support this channel, you may do this on the price of a cup of coffee here: https://www.patreon.com/martinstefanov

Thanks a ton!
Martin

videos.title: World University Ski-Orienteering Championship Rovaniemi 23-27.3.2020.
videos.description:
Rovaniemi looks like a great place to visit next March, don't you think? 
Make sure to register on time as we want to see as many of you as possible competing here at the Arctic Circle next March! ❄️❄️❄️

Register here: https://wucskio2020.com/events/registration/
https://www.fisu.net/sport-events/world-university-championships-events/ski-orienteering/2020-wuc-ski-orienteering

Follow us on our different social platforms!
- 🖥️ FISU TV: http://www.fisu.tv
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/FISU/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fisu/
‬- Twitter: ‪https://www.twitter.com/FISU
- flickr: https://www.flickr.com/photos/fisumedia/albums

Stay tuned with FISU via https://www.fisu.net. We've got you covered with information on the Universiade, FISU Sports and Athletes, National University Sports Federations and all the latest news.

videos.title: Finlandia Ski Marathon (Finlandia-hiihto) 2016 - 32 km
videos.description: Start of Finlandia Ski Marathon 2016 classic 32 km. Why not participate as a skier or spectator in 2017 and stay a week in Lahti, Finland, for activity holidays with My Finland? This is a race for all skier levels - if you think 32 km is not too much - or too little :) . Book with My Finland ! Demande d'offre avev My Finland : www.myfinland.info .

videos.title: Rovaniemi150 | race video 2014 | Finland
videos.description:
A video of my run together with Álvaro, trying to complete the 150 km under 42h from the Rovaniremi150 Arctic Winter Race. After 115k I drop out of the race, but Alvaro continues to complete the whole course. Congrats to him and to all the finishers. Big thanks to the organization to arrange such a unique race in Europe. 

Next year, I will be on the start line again :)

You can read my race report at: 
English: http://www.onedayless.com/rovaniemi150-a-half-finished-dream/
Spanish: http://www.onedayless.com/es/rovaniemi150-a-half-finished-dream/

videos.transcript:
skiers made their way over the hill and
across the trails at the 40th annual
Finlandia skiing event held at Buena
Vista Ski Resort North of Bemidji the
event saw over 100 participants go the
extra kilometer to celebrate this
Milestone here's this week's Northwoods
experience
[Music]
of different ages and experiences took
to the trails for the 40th Finlandia ski
event this past weekend there's a lot of
big ski marathons all over the state in
the Midwest and a lot of them haven't
been around nearly as long as the
Finlandia we've got a bunch of people
from Canada coming down some people from
the Twin Cities coming up Fargo but from
all over the place it's good to see that
the community support something like
this for 40 some years
whether it was for the first place
finish or just a personal best time
faces new and old looked to celebrate
this Milestone it just shows how much
the how much this race means to people
how much the organizers have put it put
effort into it every year it's an all
ages event it's a great chance to kind
of test your skills and it's got some of
the best prizes in all of cross-country
skiing well recognizing the
accomplishments of 40 Years of Finlandia
organizers managed to work around
challenges on and off the ski Trail
including the drop in participation
numbers races like this there's always
going to be fluctuations a couple of
years that are down couple years that
are high so participation has dropped
over the years only because you know
there's more and more races all around
the state today alone I think there's
five different races within the Midwest
here that people can choose from
members this year this year participants
who cross that finish line now look to
the Future for Finlandia in the future
we'd like to see the numbers go back up
again so you know if we could do you
know a little more cross you know a
promotion and things like that and
organize with other races and trying to
get their numbers back up but other than
that I mean we're really happy with the
way things turn out

videos.title: Finlandia Ski Marathon - Lakeland News at Ten - February 15, 2013
videos.transcript:
cross country ski enthusiasts will get
the chance to ski with International
skiers as well as former Olympians this
weekend near Bemidji the 32nd Finlandia
ski Marathon starts at 10 tomorrow
morning the event will include three
separate races some of the courses will
be for more seasoned skiers but others
will be just for for beginners and an
area will also be set up for those who
wish to relax and just watch the race
the trails are in the best condition
that we've ever seen and and our current
board has been a pretty solid Board of
you know eight people who have been
there for about 12 to 15 years and in
our recollection this is our best year
that we've ever had for snow if you've
enjoyed this segment of Lakeland news
please consider making a tax deductible
contribution to Lakeland Public
Television

videos.title: Rovaniemi 150 ULTRA MARATHON Lapland (66 klm race)
Arctic Marathon Finland Long Play 2022
videos.description:
First edition of the Arctic Marathon Finland in Santa Claus Village Rovaniemi 4th april 2022, combining the race with huskies activity.
Distance: 10k, half marathon and marathon
Arctic Marathon is a race of the Wildmarathon Series in Morocco, Finland, Mexico, Peru, Tanzania and Nepal 
All races are 10k, half marathon and marathon and combines the running experience with a local touristic activity.
Wildmarathon is a member of the ATRA
#Arcticmarathon, #WildmarathonSeries, #Santaclausvillage
